description: '''Muliza''' is a traditional music and dance style from [[Cerro de Pasco]], [[Department of Pasco|Pasco region]], [[Peru]]. Other sources mention that it was originated in [[Tarma]], [[Department of Junín|Junín region]], disputing both cities the origin of the dance.{{citation needed|date=June 2020}} Popularized at the end of the 19th century, on February 3, 2014, it was declared a national cultural heritage.
